case_title: LEASECOMM CORP. VS. LIAQUAT ALI JANJUA

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT JANJUA, LIAQUAT ALI DBA TAJ MAHAL GROCERY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
